---
title: "ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today"
date: 2023-11-03
---

[Link the to free book](https://stars.library.ucf.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi?article=1097&context=oer)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<object data="ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800" aria-label="PDF: ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today.pdf">
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs. <a href="ChatGPT Assignments to Use in Your Classroom Today.pdf">Download the PDF</a>.</p>
</object>
